idCitation.resTitle: Tier Classified Chapter 21E Oil or Hazardous Material Release Sites - Location Documentation Table (LDT)

dataIdInfo.idAbs: In recognition of the critical need for the quality assurance of locational data, the MassDEP GIS Program has instituted data documentation standards for the development and maintenance of the Department's geographically referenced point data. This standard requires site identification and location documentation fields, populated by standard data documentation codes, be applied to MassDEP point data, regardless of scale or extent. This standard provides documentation necessary to assess the type and quality of point locations, as well as to track the locational history of a point feature in GIS. This standard was developed in accordance with EPA's current standard for documenting locational data.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: Tier Classified Chapter 21E Oil or Hazardous Material Release Sites - Location Documentation Table (LDT)

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
